meanings.definition: make an inversion (in a musical composition)
reverse the position, order, relation, or condition of
examples: when forming a question, invert the subject and the verb

meanings.definition: turn inside out or upside down
being in such a position that top and bottom are reversed
examples: a quotation mark is sometimes called an inverted comma

meanings.definition: (of a plant ovule) completely inverted; turned back 180 degrees on its stalk
